name: growth-division
description: Study 4 — growth & division: one individual becomes a heterogeneous population. The precarious individual grows as its (abstracted) autopoietic loop runs and, past a size threshold, DIVIDES into two daughters. The membrane is partitioned with noise so daughters differ; a heritable trait is inherited with mutation so lineages DIVERSIFY over generations. Division is precarious — a daughter that inherits too little membrane to maintain itself dissolves. Starve it (``supply=0``) and the lineage collapses: the no-self-maintenance control.

supply.description: Per-step membrane growth (self-maintenance). 0 collapses the lineage (negative control).

seed.description: RNG seed for the division/partition/mutation/cull draws (deterministic per seed).
